mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_protocol_http (protocol_id, http_url, http_method, http_headers, timeout, retry_times, status) VALUES (#{protocolId}, #{httpUrl}, #{httpMethod}, #{httpHeaders}, #{timeout}, #{retryTimes}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_protocol_http SET protocol_id = #{protocolId}, http_url = #{httpUrl}, http_method = #{httpMethod}, http_headers = #{httpHeaders}, timeout = #{timeout}, retry_times = #{retryTimes}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, protocol_id, http_url, http_method, http_headers, timeout, retry_times, status, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_protocol_http ORDER BY id DESC
